programs.title: Infomercial
programs.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programs.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programs.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programs.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programs.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programs.title: Farm To Fork
programs.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programs.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programs.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.
